evals.prompt: I have vibration sensor data from 3 axes and want to detect motor faults on an F28P55. My data is at /home/user/motor_data.zip. Help me set up the full tiny ML pipeline.
evals.expected_output: Skill walks through all 13 steps: confirms installation, sets WORK_DIR, validates dataset format, generates all 6 config sections as files, assembles config.yaml, and offers to run training.

evals.prompt: I want to do time series anomaly detection on a CC2755 device. I have sensor readings in /data/normal_ops/ and /data/faults/. Walk me through setting up the config.
evals.expected_output: Skill identifies generic_timeseries_anomalydetection task, validates CC2755 device, checks dataset structure for Normal/Anomaly folders, recommends forced_soft_npu_preset for compilation, and generates all config sections.

evals.prompt: Help me do image classification for a defect detection system on an F28P65. I have 500 labeled images across 4 classes.
evals.expected_output: Skill identifies image_classification task, vision module, F28P65 device, analyzes small dataset size (500 samples), recommends lightweight models, and walks through the full config creation workflow.
